mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, NVL(p.safety_qty, 0) AS safety_qty, NVL(SUM(il.current_qty), 0) AS available_qty FROM product p LEFT JOIN inventory_lot il ON p.product_id = il.product_id AND il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.current_qty > 0 AND il.expiry_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 11 WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.safety_qty
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND alert_type = 'SAFETY_STOCK_LOW' AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert ( alert_id, product_id, alert_type, message, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_ALERT.NEXTVAL, #{productId}, 'SAFETY_STOCK_LOW', #{message}, 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, il.inventory_lot_id, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty FROM product p JOIN inventory_lot il ON p.product_id = il.product_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.current_qty > 0 AND il.expiry_date BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 30

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, il.inventory_lot_id, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty FROM product p JOIN inventory_lot il ON p.product_id = il.product_id WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.current_qty > 0 AND il.expiry_date <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 30
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO alert ( alert_id, product_id,
inventory_lot_id,
alert_type, message, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_ALERT.NEXTVAL, #{productId},
#{inventoryLotId},
#{alertType}, #{message}, 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP )
